title: Craftable Totem
description: Tired of hunting Evokers for a Totem of Undying? This data pack/mod adds a balanced, lore friendly crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying using gold and emeralds.
body:
Craft your own Totem of Undying with ease! This project offers both a datapack and a mod version that add a balanced crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying. Use gold blocks, gold ingots, and emeralds to create this powerful item without relying on rare mob drops.

Features:

Two versions available: datapack and mod

Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+

Simple and balanced crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying

Easy installation and seamless integration into your world or modpack


![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ecdf4b38b31b5808047f7a131f7c6702fe5df28.png)
